name: What outcome should I realistically expect from Siri optimization?
description: Better chances of being used in voice answers, not a guaranteed Siri placement.

mainEntity.name: What outcome should I realistically expect from Siri optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most businesses should expect Siri visibility to be a byproduct of good information architecture, not a separate campaign. The practical goal is to make your site and listings so clear that Siri can confidently reuse them. If you keep the facts consistent and the answers direct, you improve your odds across voice and search experiences.
acceptedAnswer.description: Better chances of being used in voice answers, not a guaranteed Siri placement.
